_notes: Quarantined test fixture. narrator_type='test' blocks all family-truth writes. Do NOT edit ad-hoc — changes invalidate baseline comparisons in regression runs.

kinship.occupation: Railroad mechanic for the Northern Pacific
kinship.notes: Kept a toolbox by the back door his whole life. Died 1977.

kinship.occupation: School secretary at Helena West Elementary
kinship.notes: Grew up in a Scottish-immigrant household. Died 1989.
Three years younger. Became a registered nurse in Spokane.

notes: Raised in a white clapboard house on 11th Avenue near the Helena rail yard.
Attended Helena West Elementary, then Helena High (graduated 1959).
Worked in the Lewis and Clark County clerk's office for 32 years.
Married Thomas Dale in 1964; moved to Missoula in 1968.
Known in her family for keeping meticulous archives of newspaper clippings, ledgers, and family documents in labeled binders.
Answers questions directly and chronologically. Prefers dates, names, and concrete facts over embellishment.
Retired in 1998. Lives in a small house with a south-facing kitchen window.
